assertions.description: Despite pin-resolution failures, the legacy parser correctly extracts all 55 components, 27 unique parts, the same BOM (all values and footprints match the .kicad_sch output), and the same power rails ['+12V', 'GND', 'VCC']. Net name discovery via labels is complete: 63 nets resolved vs 83 in modern (difference explained by unnamed junction nets and net-name normalization between formats).
